name: Home Assistant
description: Open-source home automation platform. Controls 2000+ integrations from one dashboard.

steps.instruction: Create your account: enter a name, username, and password. This is the owner/admin account. Click 'Create Account'. Set your home name, location (for weather/sun automations), and preferred units. Click Next through the wizard

Home Assistant will auto-discover smart devices on your network (Hue, Sonos, Chromecast, etc.). Click 'Configure' next to any discovered device to add it. You can also add devices later from Settings → Devices & Services → Add Integration
For Zigbee/Z-Wave USB devices: edit docker-compose.yml → uncomment the 'devices:' section under home-assistant → add your USB path (e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0:/dev/ttyUSB0). Restart with: docker compose up -d
Create API token: click your avatar (bottom left sidebar) → scroll to 'Long-Lived Access Tokens' → click 'Create Token' → name it 'homestack' → copy the token shown
Paste your Home Assistant API token
